name: infinite-adventure-doudou
description: 無限冒險-豆豆版：可部署到 Cloudflare Pages 的純 HTML/CSS/JS 文字 RPG demo。

scripts.check:syntax: node --check assets/reference-catalog.js && node --check assets/game-core.js && node --check assets/app.js && node --check scripts/build.mjs && node --check scripts/check-inline.mjs && node --check scripts/check-cloudflare-free.mjs && node --check scripts/smoke.mjs && node --check tests/game-core.test.mjs
scripts.check: npm run check:syntax && npm run test && npm run check:inline && npm run build && npm run check:cloudflare-free
scripts.deploy:cf:free: npm run check && npx wrangler pages deploy dist --project-name infinite-adventure-doudou --branch main
